title: Structured Event Calendar Generator
scenario: Generate a structured event calendar in JSON format for a conference with multiple tracks and sessions. The calendar should include the conference name, date, location, track names, and session details. The output should be well-formatted and concise, within 300 words. The calendar should also include a list of speakers and their corresponding sessions.
constraints: Must include a list of speakers and their corresponding sessions

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated event calendar adheres to the constraints of word limit and including a list of speakers and their corresponding sessions.
Check if the generated JSON syntax is correct and follows standard best practices.
Check if the event calendar has a clear and organized structure, with headings and subheadings.
